positive: A central, symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized neon celestial elements integrated with intricate baroque botanical motifs. The core design should be comprised of detailed vector-art silhouettes of cosmic ferns, glowing crescent moons, and astral fauna (like stylized hummingbirds and geometric butterflies). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire, electric turquoise, iridescent lavender, and vibrant gold ink accents. The composition must be clean, highly readable, and suitable for single-color screen printing on apparel. Emphasize crisp lines, thick contours, and strong negative space separation. Studio shot, graphic design poster style, highly detailed line work, smooth gradients, symmetrical composition, elegant, mystical.
negative: low resolution, blur, artifacts, ugly, malformed, text, watermark, logo, signature, gradient mesh, noise, grayscale, monochrome, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame
